zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Lucy於大約1177年出生在英國肯特聶文頓時，他的父親Geoffrey de Lucy59歲，母親Second Wife de Lucy54歲。他於1207年與Juliana Despencer在英國英格蘭肯特聶文頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1223年被列為warden of guernsey。他去世於大約1234年12月在英國英格蘭素瑞聶文頓享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Lucy于大约1177年出生在英国肯特聶文頓时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Lucy59岁，母亲Second Wife de Lucy54岁。他于1207年与Juliana Despencer在英国英格兰肯特聶文頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1223年被列为warden of guernsey。他去世于大约1234年12月在英国英格兰素瑞聶文頓享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Lucy was born about 1177, in Newington, Kent, England, his father, Geoffrey de Lucy, was 59 and his mother, Second Wife de Lucy, was 54. He married Juliana Despencer in 1207, in Newington, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1223, his occupation is listed as warden of guernsey. He died about December 1234, in Newington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Lucy est né environ 1177, à Newington, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Lucy, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Second Wife de Lucy, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Despencer en 1207, à Newington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1223, sa profession de son indiquée est warden of guernsey. Il est décédé environ décembre 1234, à Newington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Lucy um 1177 in Newington, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Lucy 59 und seine Mutter Second Wife de Lucy 54. Er hat 1207 in Newington, Kent, England, United Kingdom Juliana Despencer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1223 ist sein Beruf als warden of guernsey aufgeführt. Er starb um Dezember 1234 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Newington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Lucy è nato il circa 1177 nel Newington, Kent, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Lucy, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Second Wife de Lucy, aveva 54 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Despencer nel 1207, nel Newington, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1223, la sua occupazione è indicata come warden of guernsey. Morì circa dicembre 1234, nel Newington, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Lucyが約1177年にイギリスケントニューイントンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Lucyは59歳，母Second Wife de Lucyは54歳であった。1207年にイギリスイギリスケントニューイントンでJuliana Despencerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1223年，職業はwarden of guernseyと記録されている。彼は約1234年12月にイギリスイギリススリーニューイントンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Lucy(이)가 대략 1177년 영국 켄트 뉴잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Lucy(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Second Wife de Lucy(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1207년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 뉴잉턴에서 Juliana Despencer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1223년, 그의 직업은 warden of guernsey이었다. 그는 대략 1234년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 수리 뉴잉턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Lucy nasceu aproximadamente 1177, em Newington, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Lucy, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Second Wife de Lucy, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Despencer em 1207, em Newington, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1223, sua profissão aparece como warden of guernsey. Ele faleceu aproximadamente dezembro de 1234, em Newington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Lucy родился около 1177 г. в местности нюингтон, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Lucy было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Second Wife de Lucy, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Despencer в 1207 г. в местности нюингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1223 году он работал по профессии warden of guernsey. Он умер около декабрь 1234 г. в местности нюингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Lucy nació aproximadamente 1177, en Newington, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Lucy, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Second Wife de Lucy, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Juliana Despencer en 1207, en Newington, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1223, su ocupación registrada era warden of guernsey. Murió aproximadamente diciembre de 1234, en Newington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
